name: Plastic knife
description: Stabbity Stabbity, but much less painful.

name: Short sword
description: Gets the Urist McDwarf Seal of Approval!

name: Dragon sword
description: You won't have any trouble 'dragon' this one around.

name: Bronze axe
description: I'd like to place an order for 300, please.

name: Wooden axe
description: Not going to cut much with this

name: Fur coat
description: PETA is going to have a field day with this

name: Heavy armor
description: Only Stravich could ever wear this.

name: Stone armor
description: Is this some kind of joke?!

name: Gold armor
description: Perfect for target practice... and you'd be the target

name: Crystal robe
description: I would not want to wear this when it shatters

name: Plastic plate
description: Good for eating off of. Not so good as a shield.

name: Wood shield
description: Good for defending against a wooden axe.

name: Iron shield
description: Decent Protecting for a decent price

name: Semi-automated IRC bot system+
description: Power! At the distance of merely a few keystrokes, UNLIMITED POWERRRRR!!!!

name: Thief's Dagger
description: What, does it grant +4 Sneak or something?

name: Demoness Overlord Attire
description: Put your clothes back on, Etna

name: Demoness Overlord High Heels
description: Etna kicked these at me a few days ago when she got called 'flat-chested'

name: Jedi training helmet
description: Shields from distractive optical sensations (like post layouts) and allows the aspiring forum knight to focus his mind on the actual post contents.

name: Catgirl ears
description: So cute they're guaranteed to make people go "KAWAII! ^_^", or your money back!

name: Spare Brain
description: A spare brain in a jar, in case your main one dies from too much *chan.

name: Aleph-null
description: Able to bore even the highest minds to sleep with maths that make no sense.

name: Keg of Booze
description: 1.5 bushels of the finest brew. Don't drink it all at once, NSNick :P

name: Paper Hat
description: Made out of newspaper. Used in elementary school playground games.

name: Tinfoil Hat
description: Shields you from government mind control. Also shields you from being regarded as a sane person.

name: Steel-plated Party Hat
description: The best precaution you can take if you want to party hard.

name: Kasa's Sword
description: Because every evil shadowy figure needs a good weapon.

name: Gurren Lagann's Helmet
description: Gurren-Lagann's helmet: Just make sure you stay away from Viral whilst wearing this.

name: Matter-Less Hat
description: Super cool hat. Now 100% matter free for those allergic to anything but nothingness. No idea how it raises MP, but it does.

name: Captain Falcon's Helmet
description: Lots of speed, but watch out for Goroh! Oh, and this won't give you the punch, either.

name: Plumber's Hat
description: What the @#$%, you took this off of Acmlm didn't you?!

name: Kamina's Hatglasses
description: There's something you don't see every day

name: Holoshield
description: No idea where the Technology came from, but it's a worthwhile investment if you can afford it.

name: Tsukasa's Wand
description: Ludicrous World we live in. Using this item gives you great power, but traps you in the board. You may be able to call upon your guardian for assistance.

name: Abracadabra
description: Generic Wand. Does magical stuff. Will not accidentally backfire on you like Ron's does.

name: Kamek's Wand
description: Useful for enlarging little things so they can devour babies

name: Generification Wand
description: What the hell, this isn't even magical! Increases code complexity, headaches, and attractiveness of alcohol.

name: Kasa's baseball cap
description: Sporting the latest great design, this cap screams designer. And it's made of woven adamantine, too!

name: Baseball Cap
description: A regular baseball cap, with an unintelligible logo on the back.

name: Boots ME
description: I heard they were made in a week

name: Socks
description: Great for DDR, not so great considering the needle you just stepped in

name: Ancient Tome
description: Increases magical ability, but it's pretty darned big...

name: Boom Box
description: For when you really like your music. Heavy, too.

name: Laptop Computer
description: Because we all like to look at our "image" collections on the go.

name: Scouter
description: What does the scouter say about his powerlevel?

name: Beamsabre
description: Lightweight and powerful, but very expensive

name: Cleric's robe
description: Sorry, I don't think the Geneva Convention covers clerics...

name: Ragged Cloak
description: Great if you're stuck in a desert, out of place in hgih society.

name: Biker's Leather Jacket
description: Yeah, because you're so infinitely tough.

name: Semtex Vest
description: On the plus side, nobody is ever going to come anywhere NEAR you.

name: Plated Low Boots
description: Fancy futuristic boots, but apart from the price tag they're not all that great.

name: Woven Steel Teardrop
description: A strong, relatively lightweight shield that also folds up into an airplane-friendly carrying bag!

name: Tower Shield
description: Might be strong, but what, you thought you were going somewhere?

name: Booze
description: Hit the Ballmer's Peak and you'll be a super coder. Miss it and you're not driving yourself home tonight.

name: Carpenter's Belt
description: Because sometimes you just want to look busy.

name: Yamaha
description: Because everyone likes to make crappy music!

name: Crowbar
description: Does that say Black Mesa on the side?

name: Medigun
description: Wait, what happened to hurting your enemies?

name: Emuz's Sage Hat
description: It's Emuz's Hat. It breaks the system!

name: Spike Stompers
description: I feel sorry for anyone stuck under you

name: Hyper Beam
description: A weapon wrought from stolen evil.

name: Top Hat
description: The ultimate in exquisite fashion. Sure to improve your confidence and luck with the ladies

name: Cane
description: Nothing quite like it. Sure to make you look as distinquished and old as you aren't.
